programme.title: Dreams In The Dust - The Divided Rise Of Afghan Cricket
programme.desc: Afghanistan has risen from sporting outsider to one of the world's top cricket nations. The unlikely journey has brought hope to a country with rare reason to celebrate while illuminating the complex politics of the Taliban's relationship to cricket.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Plastic Surgery, Family Ties And Art
programme.desc: From World War I to the Kardashians: The rise of plastic surgery. Plus, a new novel from bestselling author Leila Slimani and portraits of two artists - Rashid Johnson (U.S.) and Inuuteq Storch (Greenland).

programme.title: Blind Youth In Delhi Use Acroyoga To Overcome Exclusion
programme.desc: In Delhi, visually impaired youth deal with exclusion and fear in a chaotic city. But through acroyoga, they build trust and confidence, defying disability and societal neglect. Yoga helps them connect with their bodies and reclaim visibility in a world that often overlooks them.

programme.title: Ai & Drones: Possibilities And Risks
programme.desc: AI-enhanced drones are transforming warfare and how security agencies work. In Mexico, the police are using armed drones against cartels. In Ghana, authorities are using drones and AI to track down illegal gold mines.

programme.title: Mercedes: Iconic German Brand Or Three-Pointed Fallen Star?
programme.desc: Pummeled by Trump's tariffs and fierce competition in China, Mercedes-Benz's operating profits plunged in 2025. Why is its CEO upbeat? Plus: How e-bikes are making Ugandans life easier and test driving Kia's PV5.

programme.title: Plastic Surgery, Family Ties And Art
programme.desc: From World War I to the Kardashians: The rise of plastic surgery. Plus, a new novel from bestselling author Leila Slimani and portraits of two artists - Rashid Johnson (U.S.) and Inuuteq Storch (Greenland).

programme.title: Is Zimbabwe's Mnangagwa Eyeing A Third Term?
programme.desc: A controversial constitutional amendment is shaking Zimbabwe to its core. Tensions are rising - and turning dangerous. Critics like Prof. Madhuku narrowly survived an attack at a political meeting, calling it a chilling sign that the country's democracy may be at its lowest point in years.

programme.title: Five Unesco Sites In Germany Everyone Should See
programme.desc: Discover five of Germany's most remarkable UNESCO World Heritage Sites! From King Ludwig II's iconic palaces to the vineyard‑lined cliffs of the Upper Middle Rhine Valley, we explore medieval urban heritage in Regensburg, the Gothic masterpiece of Cologne Cathedral, and Berlin's Museum Island - home to one of the world's most outstanding museum ensembles.

programme.desc: Survival expert Bear Grylls takes real people who inspire him into the wild. E4
programme.desc: Chef Morimoto challenges the five remaining chefs to make their own versions of on-the-go Japanese street food and to 'think like Morimoto'.

programme.title: E6 - Eduardos Dinner In The Food Forest
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia cooks a rustic ranch-style dinner in his own personal 'food forest,' a massive garden filled with wild plants and aromas.

programme.title: E9 - Change Of Scenery
programme.desc: Alison joins forces with a husband-and-wife realtor team to restore a three-bedroom Spanish Revival in California's Hollywood Hills.

programme.title: E2 - Frozen In Time: Grandma Lil's Jewish-Italian-American Meatball Sauce
programme.desc: Casey visits a New York family to help them rediscover their Grandma Lil's unique, Jewish-Italian-American meatball sauce.

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: Chef Morimoto challenges the five remaining chefs to make their own versions of on-the-go Japanese street food and to 'think like Morimoto'.

programme.title: E2 - Frozen In Time: Grandma Lil's Jewish-Italian-American Meatball Sauce
programme.desc: Casey visits a New York family to help them rediscover their Grandma Lil's unique, Jewish-Italian-American meatball sauce.

programme.title: E2 - Frozen In Time: Grandma Lil's Jewish-Italian-American Meatball Sauce
programme.desc: Casey visits a New York family to help them rediscover their Grandma Lil's unique, Jewish-Italian-American meatball sauce.

programme.title: Colossal Squid
programme.desc: Ant and Fontaine hunt for the rarest of ocean creatures, the colossal squid. But what happens when it turns out to be smarter than you?

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: Zalder
programme.desc: Frank finds an old amusement park machine in the basement-Zalder, who answers any question for one silver coin. No one believes it... until he's always right! Soon, everyone's using Zalder for their own goals-until Robbie breaks it and a “new” Zalder takes over.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: Cowboys in Yoko Park
programme.desc: When a truckload of animals escapes, Yoko uses her magic to turn the situation into a full-on cowboy and cowgirl adventure!

programme.title: Roll with it
programme.desc: While the kids play house, Mai gets a little bossy and has to learn that changing the rules is ok only if everyone agrees.

programme.title: Reuse Wool
programme.desc: Today the Grimwade family decides to reuse the wool from Mummy's jumper. Grandma Melanie arrives and teaches Halle to finger knit while attempting to teach Daddy to knit with needles. Harper plans to make a toy farm and this gives grandma an idea.

programme.title: Reduce the Heating
programme.desc: To reduce the heating, Daddy shows Hosanna a device that will help them get to the bottom of the family's heat loss problem. Mummy shows Halle and Harper that with some old tights and leftover stuffing and material, they can make a draught excluder.

programme.title: Thaumatrope
programme.desc: How do you make 2 pictures blend into 1? We'll show you how with this optical illusion that'll put you in a spin!

programme.title: Art Spinner
programme.desc: Rotate to create with this crafty contraption.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: Big Sister is Listening
programme.desc: The team has invented a digital assistant that gives personal, big-sisterly advice, just like Max's real sister Chelsea. Kaylyn takes a career-advancing internship at a non-profit.

programme.title: Stinky Dr. Xand!
programme.desc: There's a pong in the lab as the Doctors reveal the special part of your brain that helps you smell. We meet snowboarding Brilliant Body Aimee Fuller to find out how your incredible hips work, and there's some serious snot in Ouchology.

programme.title: Blink and You'll Miss it!
programme.desc: Why is Dr Xand dressed as a bird in the lab? Find out why you blink in today's experiment and discover why babies walk differently to you in Ouch Baby.

programme.title: Time to Be Amazing
programme.desc: It's the first time Harry and George will be competing since George broke his arm and was told he would never be able to do gym again. And Dove and Nyree are determined to prove they are ready to take on the world!

programme.title: Secret Code
programme.desc: Eric learns that computer coding means writing programmes that tell robots and computers how to do certain jobs. Just as we use language to communicate with other people, there are lots of different programming or 'coding' languages to talk to computers.

programme.title: Pressure
programme.desc: Steve Spangler shows experiments you can do at home that illustrate the power of air pressure. It all leads to an eye-popping demonstration where Steve makes a 55-gallon steel drum implode.

programme.title: Self-Portrait
programme.desc: This episode shows how an artist can determine the accurate placement of eyes, ears, nose, chin, and lips on portraits by using proportions. We show you how you can do the same by just using a string and applying some rules about the human body.

programme.title: Pick a Block of Dates - Any Block
programme.desc: This episode introduces the mathematical mean: the number you get when you add up all numbers and divide them by the number of numbers. Eric presents a trick you can do by calculating the sum of a 3-by-3 block of dates on a calendar without using a calculator.

programme.title: No Room For Phobias
programme.desc: Today, Sam and Saira must face their fears as they are called to the zoo to take a blood sample from Bob and Bindi - a pair of very snappy West African dwarf crocodiles. And Tuppence, the one-eyed Jack Russell, needs high-tech radiation therapy treatment.

programme.title: 3, 2, 1...Lift-off!
programme.desc: The chemical reaction that takes place in the engines of a real rocket produces a large amount of very hot gas that makes the rocket lift off into the sky. Eric mixes baking powder and water to create a chemical reaction strong enough to launch a toy rocket.

programme.title: Art Spinner
programme.desc: Rotate to create with this crafty contraption.

programme.title: Trade Route
programme.desc: Howler and Little Lewis take us on an excursion down the medieval trade routes. The journey is anything but a walk in the park for these two wine merchants! In the Middle Ages, being a salesman takes a lot of guts!

programme.title: Self-Portrait

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E405 - Store Wars with the Casagrandes / Lucha Fever with the Casagrandes
programme.desc: When a fancy new grocery store opens on the block, Bobby rallies the family to do everything they can to compete. // Ronnie Anne fakes being sick to watch a Lubra Libre match, which proves to be more difficult than anticipated.

programme.title: E197 - Mall Girl Pearl / Two Thumbs Down
programme.desc: Pearl gets a job to be cool like her friends, but the only store that’s hiring is the lamest store at the mall! // SpongeBob loses the use of his thumbs, and must get them back in working order before his entire life falls apart.

programme.title: E104 - Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: E204 - Suite and Sour / Back in Black
programme.desc: After Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort, they decide to take the kids - but only because they promised to behave. // When Lucy gets a crush on a 'regular and normal' boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

programme.title: E205 - Making the Grade / Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake! // Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: E208 - No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: E305 - Miles Sells His Soul
programme.desc: In an effort to help Mika defeat her rival in a riff-off, Miles sells his soul to a suave demon who lives in The Man's Nest Abyss Room. Captain Man must face the demon in a Ukulele-Log-Rolling competition in order to get all the kids' souls back.

programme.title: E534 - Cave the Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up a secret underground restaurant in the Man Cave for Charlotte's private dinner with music superstar Jack Swagger. When word gets out that Jack Swagger is in town, some unwanted guests crash the party.

programme.title: E703 - Candy Crushed / Master of Delusion
programme.desc: Lola struggles to dampen her sweet tooth when mom challenges her to go an entire week without sugar. // Lincoln strives to impress the Amazing Brailster when he's chosen to be his assistant at the Illusion Chateau.

programme.title: E409 - Love Birds
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: E204 - Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.desc: Dog and Pug have a power cut in the bookshop. They want to know what it was like before electricity and they go to an old lighthouse. The light is about to go out before the keeper can return.

programme.title: E14 - Gills
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy wants to know how his goldfish friend can stay underwater for so long. He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: E23 - Arcade Dance Off
programme.desc: Stumbling across an arcade, Sarah takes on a dancing challenge with John, whilst Duck and Flamingo team up to try and defeat a video game!

programme.title: E20 - Thomas' Animal Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to help at the animal park for the day and realizes that it also involves being decorated as a monkey.

programme.title: E14 - Takeaway
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: E2 - Evil Pea's Big Freeze
programme.desc: Evil Pea freezes the veggies so she can take over the whole supermarket. Chilli's heat unfreezes Supertato who then races on lolly-stick skis to thwart Evil Pea and save the day.

programme.title: E1 - Norrie's First Day
programme.desc: Norrie skips into the Clubhouse and greets her friends. As they greet her, they reminisce about when they first met.

programme.title: E2 - The Moving Badge
programme.desc: Snail is thrilled to be moving house as she wishes to escape the wet and sploshy place she currently calls home to a more spacious house on the hill.

programme.title: E6 - Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: E4 - Rainforests Of Sumatra, Indonesia
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

programme.title: E5 - Go Jet Academy: Artificial Reef
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: E6 - Machu Picchu, Peru
programme.desc: A giant grimbot bounces down the valley of Machu Picchu. Can the Go Jetters stop him?

programme.title: E25 - Sandy And Seaweed's Treasure Trove
programme.desc: Squawk takes us on a journey to find Sandy and Seaweed's top Swashbuckle moments.

programme.title: E12 - The Greatest Adventure
programme.desc: He-He Krash and Amelia play. Amelia tells everyone that her flight is the most interesting

programme.title: E2 - Hammerbarn
programme.desc: On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: E3 - Featherwand
programme.desc: Bluey and Mum are off to Chloe's party and Bingo isn't invited. But armed with a magic featherwand that makes things incredibly heavy, Bingo can now stop them leaving the house.

programme.title: E1 - The Tato Team
programme.desc: During the Veggies' Super Sidekick Costume Contest, Evil Pea traps Supertato in a jar of honey. All is lost until the Veggies become real super sidekicks, the Tato Team!

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: Music Bank K-Chart
programme.desc: Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: E317
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Romantic comedy about uniformed elite cadets chasing after their dreams.

programme.desc: A talk show brings you music and stories that will 'get rid of all your worries and all your concerns.'

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 女急救醫生杏野朱羅(松本若菜)有著出色的醫療技術，甚至能夠同時為兩名重症患者進行高難度手術，以致被稱為「阿修羅醫生」，她從不考慮醫院的利益，亦不會顧忌上級，只會專注拯救眼前的患者，即使對方身無分文又或者是黑道成員，都堅信要絕對幫助他們！

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 故事描繪一位除了愛什麼都不懂的笨拙綁匪與一位不懂愛的天才少女，性格迥異的命運共同體“父女”，展開一段獨特的逃亡旅程。主角新庄政宗（齋藤工）為了籌措患有心臟病女兒的手術費，在妻子的提議下，決定綁架富有的醫院院長之女七瀬凛（永尾柚乃）。新庄一直猶豫不決，但在妻子不斷策動下，他終於開車來到院長宅邸附近時，一名女孩突然衝到他的車前。千鈞一髮之際，避免了事故。當凛醒來時，卻發現她失去記憶。新庄情急之下謊稱自己是她的爸爸，從此被迫開始扮演“父親”的角色。而凛的父母已被某個神秘人物殺害，新庄也因此成為殺人嫌疑犯。然而他所綁架的凛，竟是一位能操多國語言、博學多聞、思維敏捷的天才少女。從這一刻起，原本居於主導地位的新庄反而成了凛的依靠，開始向她尋求擺脫困境的建議，兩人的關係也因此徹底逆轉。除了警方外，新庄與凛還遭到來歷不明、意圖不明的男子追擊。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 晴原柑九朗作為SDM本部首席代表兼氣象研究員利用智慧與知識，冒著生命危險站在最前線，保護人們的性命免受巨大氣象災害威脅，為使命奮鬥的故事。​

programme.title: E117 - Cattle Drive
programme.desc: When Blaze and Starla encounter a herd of cows wandering out in the desert, they must embark on a wild west adventure to bring them back to Starla's barn.

programme.title: E105 - The Crew Builds A Car Wash / The Crew Plans Grandpa Day
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway needs her muddy motorcycle cleaned fast! Wheeler and the pups jump into action to build a solution before the big race. // It's Grandpa Gravel's special day! But when the pups are needed, they have to change their Grandpa Day plans.

programme.title: E318 - Pups In A Jam / Pups Save A Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: E319 - Pups Get Growing / Pups Save A Space Toy
programme.desc: Fertilizer causes Yumi's crops to sprout huge veggies, so Ryder and the Paw Patrol must corral the stampeding produce! // The Paw Patrol draws a message on Farmer Al's field to tell the space aliens the pups found their lost toy!

programme.title: E202 - A Pinata For Mami / Invisi-Swiper
programme.desc: Dora's family makes a pinata for Mami's birthday, but it flies away! They have to get it back safe before Mami arrives. / Swiper swipes an invisibility blanket! Now Invisi-Swiper is swiping everything, and it's up to Dora and Boots to stop him.

programme.title: E109 - Daddy Loses His Glasses
programme.desc: Daddy Pig is a little upset because he lost his glasses, so Peppa and George try to find them.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E316 - Puptown Funk
programme.desc: When the Sharkpack attempts to take the sharkpups out, they keep going into Sharkmode and no one can figure out why.

programme.title: E318 - Sharks On A Boat
programme.desc: The Sharkpack board Barb's boat to go after the loose sharkpups.

programme.title: E615 - The Boingies!
programme.desc: When a bunch of adorable critters called Boingies get lost in Axle City, it's up to Blaze and AJ to gather them up and get them home safe and sound.

programme.title: E121 - The Crew Fixes The Talent Show Stage / The Crew Builds Instruments
programme.desc: When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the day. // Sierra Sparkle is coming to sing for Builder Cove Day! But when the band's instruments break, Rubble & Crew have a construction solution.

programme.title: E122 - The Crew Builds A Giant Dam / The Crew Builds A Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E106 - The Little Axolotl / Bubble Trouble
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find an adorable baby axolotl. They have to bring him home, but he keeps wandering off. // The Big Red Chicken gets stuck in a giant floating bubble and is heading straight for a volcano! Dora has to do a mid-air rescue to save him.

programme.title: E750 - Grandpa's Toy Plane
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: E801 - The Panda Twins
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda brings his twin daughters Peggi and Pandora Panda to playgroup for the first time.

programme.title: E911 - The Great Train Race
programme.desc: Blaze becomes a high-speed train to compete in The Great Train Race! But Crusher is in the race too, and he's determined to chugga-chugga-cheat! Will Blaze win and take home the Golden Train Trophy, or will Crusher knock him off track?

programme.title: E308 - Pups Save Daring Danny X / Pups In A Fix
programme.desc: Daring Danny X takes his ambitions too far when he attempts a jump over Rattle Snake Canyon! The Paw Patrol wows with a mid-air rescue. // RoboDog's wiring gets mixed up, and he goes on a fixing rampage around Adventure Bay!

programme.title: E115 - The Crew Builds A School / The Crew Builds A Waterway
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: E750 - Grandpa's Toy Plane
programme.desc: Grandpa Pig shares with Peppa and George his love of building toy planes and there is one extra special plane that Granny Pig has yet to see.

programme.title: E801 - The Panda Twins
programme.desc: Police Officer Panda brings his twin daughters Peggi and Pandora Panda to playgroup for the first time.

programme.title: E108 - Double Booked / Bogweed / Prizes
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: E6 - Siblings Month: Imaginative Play!
programme.desc: Get ready for imaginative play with Baby John & his siblings! First, they use brand-new building blocks to create the biggest fort of all! Then, Dad helps them wash their toy cars in a super fun car wash song. The imagination continues as they dress up like little dinosaurs for a party, go on a fishing trip & set up their own lemonade stand. From a trip to the toy store to taking care of Mom, it's a month of sibling creativity!

programme.title: E2 - Tiny Heroes, Giant-Sized Adventures!
programme.desc: Mila & Morphle may be small, but they're tiny heroes on giant-sized adventures! When a hamster gets stuck in a colorful cardboard maze, a rescue mission begins! Mila & Morphle get shrunk to hamster size & go into the maze to find their little furry pal. Then, when a whale gets stranded on the beach, the friends shrink it to get it back to the ocean. But when Winston races away with the tiny whale, the chase is on!

programme.title: E2 - When Magical Pet Powers Run Wild!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos as Magical Pet powers run wild! First, Bubblebear creates so many bubbles that they join together & become a giant Bubble Monster that traps everyone! Then, when Shrubcub gets sick, Pet Port is invaded by wayward vines, & the friends have to race against time to get her some magic tea. The wild powers continue as Slushyseal turns buildings & cars into giant juice pops that start to melt all over town!

programme.title: E3 - Siblings Month: Creative Play Fun!
programme.desc: Get creative with JJ & his siblings! TomTom leads his lab assistants JJ & YoYo in fun science experiments, like making slime & a volcano! Then, YoYo teaches JJ how to make the perfect peanut butter & jelly sandwich. The creative fun continues as they record cool sounds with a cassette player, pretend to be a train & play a game of 'The Floor is Lava' in the living room! It's a month of imagination & creativity!

programme.title: E2 - Siblings Month: Bedtime Stories & Fun!
programme.desc: Get ready for bedtime stories & fun with JJ! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo for a slumber party where they jump, wiggle & shuffle in their cute pajamas! Then, help them find five missing little ducks before bedtime. The fun continues with a busy morning routine, a heroic bath time rescue with sea creature toys & a game of 'Happy and You Know It' to cheer everyone up! It's a month of cozy moments & sibling fun.

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Game Day Goofs & Grandma's Fixes!
programme.desc: Get ready for game day goofs & Grandma's amazing fixes! The fun starts with a basketball game, but when Max the Monster Truck tries a slam dunk, he breaks his suspension & gets a teddy bear stuck in the hoop! Then, when Gecko gets a boo boo while trying to fix Bobby the Bus's mixed-up controls, Grandma Gecko arrives just in time to help with the repair. The day ends with Grandma's own goof, as she starts sleepwalking during a sleepover!

programme.title: E1 - Siblings Month: Outdoor Adventures!
programme.desc: Join JJ & his siblings for outdoor adventures! First, JJ wants to race his pedal coupe like his siblings race their monster trucks! Then, cool off on a hot summer day with a homemade water park in the backyard. The outdoor fun continues as they search for sea creatures by the bay, dance with ants & ladybugs in the garden & have a silly time with a magical Bananaphone that makes everyone dance!

programme.title: E13 - Siblings Month: Helping Out!
programme.desc: Celebrate Siblings Month by helping out! First, JJ assumes the role of a pretend doctor, taking care of TomTom & YoYo with a checkup & lollipops. Then, the siblings team up with Daddy to bake a special cake for Mom! The helpfulness continues as they wash a dirty car together after a soccer game & TomTom helps JJ learn to use the potty. Plus, join the family on a nature walk with Bingo to learn about animals & nature!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Special Day with Jill!
programme.desc: Join Jill for a super special day of friendship & discovery! First, she's at the playground with her friends when she notices a new girl is there all alone. Jill takes it upon herself to make friends with the girl & make her feel welcome. Then, while all of her friends know what their 'thing' is, Jill is unsure. She tries playing sports & dancing, but none of them stick. Eventually, she discovers that she's really good at arts & crafts & makes friendship bracelets for everyone!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: L'instant mobile
programme.desc: Emission info de format court qui traite des sujets palpitants provenant du tout le monde.

programme.title: E1 - Winter is Coming
programme.desc: As soon as the days get cold and dark insects begin to disappear from the meadows and fields. Their sum and hum slowly fades away and will finally be gone. All animals have their special ways to survive winter. Migrating birds like swallows and cranes fly towards south, a lot of mammals like deer get a thick winter fur or hide away and sleep where it’s warm. But what do insects do? And why are they all back in spring?

programme.title: E2 - Meadow of Horror
programme.desc: It is horror! It is murder! Brutal death as well as exciting fights with an exceptional last-minute rescue. And after seeing it – you will know the creepiest spot is actually the meadow in your neighborhood. With stylistic devices from the horror genre this extraordinary nature documentary takes you on a journey following a well-known hero with six legs, red wings and seven black dots through a seemingly normal meadow – but full of monsters.

programme.title: E3 - God's Darling: Beetles
programme.desc: Beetles have inhabited the Earth for more than 240 million years. There are around 380,000 kinds of beetles known to scientists and every year hundreds of new species are discovered. One fourth of the world’s animals are beetles. They have conquered almost every corner and every habitat on the planet and they have survived every global disaster. What is it that makes them so successful?

programme.title: E1 - Welcome to the Tundra
programme.desc: Wake up post-hibernation with 7 ravenous bears as Stage 1 of the competition kicks off. Battle wolves with new mom BoldFace, see tiny Stomper vie for power and Blondie’s love, and stand back as grizzled vet Bernie brawls with clueless teen Casanova.

programme.title: E1 - Realm of the Bear
programme.desc: Join a mother brown bear as she struggles to find food for her two young cubs while teaching them essential skills for the harsh winter ahead. Then visit a pair of tiny lynx kittens as they begin to venture away from the safety of their den.

programme.title: E2 - Realm of the Wolf
programme.desc: In the remote wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains lives an elusive predator that has inspired awe and fear throughout history: the Eurasian wolf. Discover the vital role that these once-misunderstood hunters play in protecting their ecosystem.

programme.title: E1 - Battle Lines
programme.desc: As the dry season approaches, tensions rise on Lemur Island, both between rival gangs and within their own ranks. Get a view from the battlefield as the female leaders fiercely defend their turf, while their newborn infants cling to them for safety.

programme.title: E2 - Under Pressure
programme.desc: As food and water become scarce, Crystal, the fierce leader of the Ruins gang, sets her sights on rival Kati’s territory and its neighboring fruit trees. Watch as Crystal’s move and a raid by outside invaders lead to dire consequences for one troop.

programme.title: E4 - The Road to Independence
programme.desc: As the babies grow, new power struggles break out in each troop. Watch as every member, from fierce Queen Crystal to low-ranking Erica, jockeys for position. Meanwhile, the babies start to understand how allies and enemies will shape their future.

programme.title: E5 - The Berenty Dynasty
programme.desc: The pressure to find food reaches new heights and throws the reserve into turmoil. Witness fractures emerge within the ranks, dividing the gangs and leading Crystal, the indomitable leader of the Ruins gang, to face a challenge like none before.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Talking Europe guides you to the world of Europe's politics and cultures. Presented by Catherine Nicholson, the program revolves around top EU issues and events. Find out latest news from politicians and researchers joined by the guests of the program.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Premier League 25/26 -Tottenham Hotspur vs Crystal Palace
NBA 25/26 -Los Angeles Lakers vs Miami Heat
All's Well End's Well 2020
programme.desc: The Yau's brothers are a trio of scammers who make punishing baddies their mission. A misunderstanding leads them to fellow con artists the Lui's sisters, and they join hands to scam a notorious mob boss. Through a myriad of ingenious tricks and disguises, they bring the mobster to justice as romance blossoms swiftly...

programme.title: Project Gutenberg
programme.desc: Lee Man, a member of a notorious money counterfeiting ring, is arrested in Thailand and extradited back to Hong Kong. Thanks to renowned painter Yuen Man, Lee is offered a deal by the police: Reveal the identity of Painter, the charismatic leader of the counterfeiting ring, and Yuen can bail him out. Lee has no choice but to comply and recount his story. In the 1990s, Lee and Yuen were lovers living together in Vancouver, seeking to be seen in the art world. However, success eludes them, and Lee is forced to go make counterfeit paintings to make a living. Lee's counterfeit paintings catch the eyes of Painter, and he decides to recruits Lee to join his team. Together with Painter's elite team, Lee travels the world in search of technologies to create the “Super Dollar,” a counterfeit bill that circumvents the anti-counterfeiting measures of the 1996 American dollar. But when Lee witnesses Painter's violent methods in action, he becomes desperate to escape his employer's grip..

programme.title: Stuntman
programme.desc: LEE Sam was the undisputed king of stunt choreography during the golden era of Hong Kong action cinema in the 80s. After a devastating stunt accident, Sam steps away from the industry for 30 years. However, his old friend, a veteran director, has now persuaded Sam to work as the stunt choreographer on what will be the director's last film. The only catch is that his film stars Wai - Sam's former stunt crew member who has since become a famous action star in his own right. Sam and Wai have a contentious history, with Sam's infamously overbearing and demanding personality clashing with Wai's own ego and ambition. By chance, Sam crosses paths with a young, ambitious stuntman named LEE Sai Long, who sees this as an opportunity to advance his career. Long is caught between Sam and his former protege turned rival. At the same time, Long helps Sam to reconcile with his estranged daughter, Cherry. As Sam returns to the world he once dominated, he must confront his past, mend fences w

programme.title: Virus
programme.desc: The world is under attack from an “Love virus”? Taek-seon is a translator who always feels tired, unmotivated and uninterested in romance. One day, Taek-seon has a disastrous blind date with Su-pil, a born single medical researcher who proposes on their first meeting. After the date they met, the world is suddenly enveloped in atmosphere of love... Taek-seon found herself laughing for no reason and searching for a beautiful dress, everything looks cute, even a daily promotional text from her old classmate Yeon-woo. However, Taek-seon knew that she had been infected with 100% fatality rate deadly virus -- Toxo Virus. She meets Dr. Lee Gyun, the only researcher who can create the antiviral medicine and she realizes that all these romantic feelings are symptoms of virus. Thus, her unexpected journey begins...

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. In this episode, the “Humor Research Institute” has invited veteran filmmakers Chan Hing Kai, Ho Miu Ki and Jack Ng to talk about their comedy-creating experience and introduce how fascinating comedies are written.

programme.title: Mad Fate
programme.desc: On a rainy evening, a fortune telling master tries to help a prostitute avert certain death, but fate has plans of its own. He arrives at the prostitute's home just a few minutes too late, watching her take her last breath while Siu Tung stares at her corpse with creepy fascination. When he foretells that Siu Tung will soon commit murder, the Master believes that he has the power to change the inevitable. On the contrary, the veteran detective who once sent Siu Tung to jail for brutally killing a cat believes that Siu Tong is a born psychopath whose bloodthirst cannot be stopped. While Siu Tung becomes increasingly overwhelmed by his insatiable desire for murder, the Master puts his sanity on the line to change the course of fate. But is it possible to defeat the all-powerful force that paves life's path?

programme.title: Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. programme.title: E18 - 劉宇寧召集Seven Kids重聚 (下)
programme.desc: 將繼續以「音樂牽線，緣分發聲」為主題，賽制上進行了全面創新升級，帶來更具懸念的緣分匹配設定、更多元的趣味互動模式，以及更動人的團隊默契考驗；匯聚周深、薛之謙、單依純等10位實力歌手與新銳音樂人，通過盲選歌單、即興創作等環碰撞靈感，打造專屬合作舞台！

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 非物質文化遺產即某地區文化傳承有重要意義的行為或表現，如民俗、文化、信仰、傳統等各種智慧財產；為了全面展示保護的成果，推動高品質發展，節目打造以非物質文化遺產傳承為主題，令更多人認識及發揚光大。

programme.title: E47
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E3 - 攜手踏上茶馬古道
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

programme.title: E13 - 魔丸額王安宇整蠱沈騰
programme.desc: 出發團老成員沈騰、白敬亭、金晨、賈冰、胡先煦、王安宇、范丞丞攜手再次奔赴自然秘境，沉浸式領略各地的美麗風景；以「金木水火土」為主題線索，踏上野外探險之旅，將旅行與挑戰深度綁定，足跡從西藏林芝、齊齊哈爾等國內秘境延伸至海外極端環境。

programme.title: E11 - 愛當月老的相親男
programme.desc: 明星助力官繼續傾情加盟，通過快問快答揭秘明星不為人知的經歷和情感往事，以獨特視角助陣男女嘉賓尋找真愛。以星素之間和代際之間的磁場碰撞，解讀當下年輕人的婚戀觀。

programme.title: Destination Francophonie:2025-2026
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: E2 - Samantha's Yoo-Hoo Maid
programme.desc: Endora brings a witch with fading powers to be Samantha's maid.

programme.title: E3 - Samantha's Caesar Salad
programme.desc: Samantha asks for Caesar salad - and gets Julius himself.

programme.title: E4 - Samantha's Curious Cravings
programme.desc: When Samantha craves food, it appears, with complications.

programme.title: E25 - The Venture
programme.desc: Prosperity seems to be imminent for the Walton family when disaster strikes as John Walton is felled by pneumonia, and the family may lose all for which they have worked so hard.

programme.title: E5 - The Blue Geranium (Part 1)
programme.desc: While visiting a friend in Little Ambrose, Miss Marple investigates a man’s apparent drowning, followed by more suspicious deaths. When George Pritchard confesses, Marple doubts the conclusion and tries to prove another explanation.

programme.title: E10 - Hard Truths
programme.desc: Following the release of Ben's killer from prison, Jonah continues to struggle with anger and grief confronting the killer and putting family bonds to the test, and Mae and Sarah face painful truths that could change everything. Meanwhile, Danny and Lena take on a high-stakes case that uncovers deep-rooted secrets and forces unlikely alliances.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Season 2 of NCIS: Origins delves deeper into the unstoppable NCIS Camp Pendleton team led by the legendary Mike Franks, as well as Gibbs' early career as a special agent, and reveals the fate of Lala after last season's devastating car crash.

programme.title: E11 - Aftermath
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E1 - Dumplings And Other Stuffed Pastas
programme.desc: With Myriam Fehmiu, Anita Feng, Jason Kacprzak, and Jens Ruoff, Christian embarks on a world tour of stuffed pastas. Vegetarian dumplings, maultaschen, pierogi... the chefs share all their tips and tricks for high-level preparation.

programme.title: E3 - Clementine De Chabaneix/Nathalie And Christophe Legrand
programme.desc: Visit to the three museums at the Polish Library in Paris. Shapes navigate between imaginary worlds in ceramic artist Clementine de Chabaneix's universe. Willy Chavarria, American-Mexican designer and activist, shows at the American Cathedral in Paris. Bookbinders and gilders, Nathalie and Christophe Legrand restore books which they cover in light.

programme.title: E2 - Navigating The Terrain
programme.desc: Alexis and Thomas travel to Murdochville, in Gaspesie, and learn how backcountry skiing revived the local economy. They try cat-skiing with Guillaume Molaison and are introduced to avalanche risks by Julie Leblanc.

programme.title: E4 - Taro, The Polynesians' Tuber
programme.desc: Taro, long a staple food in the Polynesian islands, is still cultivated today in every archipelago. In the Australs, its cultivation is the most intensive: taro fields are an integral part of the inhabitants' daily lives.

programme.title: E11 - Rice Pudding
programme.desc: Leila Albert welcomes Dominique Henon, a French variety and gypsy jazz singer, into her kitchen. She shares her version of breakfast, which consists of a creamy, indulgent rice pudding, brioche pudding and strawberry coulis.

programme.title: E32 - Sully-Sur-Loire - Le Hallier
programme.desc: The Sange Tower of the Sully-sur-Loire castle, a former watchtower, offers a breathtaking view. Its exact use remains unclear, but it probably served the soldiers. Not far from Pithiviers, in Nibelle, the Hallier castle was a gift from King Charles IX to Marie Touchet.

programme.title: E27 - While Waiting For Summer
programme.desc: On the menu: egg and fine herb nests, spring roll bundles, ricotta, green bean and asparagus sandwich, lemon tarts.

programme.title: Dreamscapes, Architectural Wonders (II)
programme.desc: DREAMSCAPES, ARCHITECTURAL WONDERS: From simple residential cottage, impressive royal mansion to magnificent skyscraper, behind those bricks and steel structure, it is the historical and cultural designs that make them immortal. This program shows the great architectures and how they inspire us in various ways.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 謝盈萱等原班人馬回歸出演，天心加盟飾演新角色。 40歲的陳嘉玲從天龍國回到家鄉台南，展開人生下半場。第一件要努力的事就是靠自己的雙手，把買下的鬼屋變成家。但一開始就發生一連串意外，摔傷、被蜜蜂叮，還坐輪椅進了醫院……新的一季看陳嘉玲如何用盡全力，開始書寫另一段人生篇章。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 《愛很美味》講述了三位個性迥異、特色鮮明的都市麗人，在經歷了一系列創業的艱辛，職場的壓迫，和感情的波折後，對生活、事業和愛情都有了重新的認識。

E7 - Three Causes, One Death
programme.desc: A wealthy widow's sudden death perplexes investigators. But with conflicting causes of death and millions at stake, suspicion falls on those closest to her.

programme.title: E8 - Groomed To Death
programme.desc: A horse groomer's apparent suicide is called into question years later, when a near-identical crime scene suggests a serial killer may be at work.

programme.title: E9 - The Final Pulse
programme.desc: An off-duty police officer calls 911 to report his wife unconscious. As suspicions mount that he may be to blame for her death, an unexpected twist changes everything.

programme.title: E10 - Mother's Trigger
programme.desc: A 10-year-old calls 911: he shot his dad. It seems like a tragic accident-until nine years later, he reveals a darker truth.

programme.title: E1 - A Man And His Balloon
programme.desc: When a 71-year-old man is found shot dead in a field, investigators suspect his killing is the result of a robbery. But as new evidence surfaces, detectives develop a wild theory to explain his death, and only a voice from the grave can prove it.

programme.title: E3 - Death Below Deck
programme.desc: When a Navy officer succumbs to a mysterious illness after months at sea, nothing makes sense, until an autopsy yields a stunning revelation. All roads lead to dead ends, until they zero in on an unlikely target.

programme.title: E4 - Death By Request
programme.desc: A devoted husband, military man, and father of three calls the police with a chilling confession: he's shot his wife. What first appears to be a straightforward homicide soon unravels into something far more complex.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Flirting Scholar
programme.desc: Tong Park Foo is the top-grade scholar in Suzhou. On a feast day, Tong and his friends go to visit the temple and there, Tong meets Chau Heung for the first time. Tong is shaken at Chau's beauty. He decides to go after her. But Chau's master Mrs. Wah is very angry with Tong's family, how can Tong make Chau Heung his bride?

programme.title: Seven Years Itch
programme.desc: Living together for 7 years, Raymond has been faithful to Sylvia. But he is eager to having an affair after being teased by his colleagues. On his business trip to Singapore, he is being used by a charming girl, Siu Hung to smuggle some stolen jewelry. Raymond mistakes for love luck yet he fails to have an affair with Siu Hung before she sneaks away with the jewelry. When he returns home, a diamond ring is found in his luggage and Sylvia takes it as her birthday present. Raymond is so involved with Siu Hung that he decides to take Sylvia on a trip to Singapore to bring back the memory. He requests Sylvia to act if they were first met, but it comes an intruder Money who falls in love with Sylvia at first sight...

programme.title: 3 Days Of A Blind Girl
programme.desc: Heung is temporarily blinded by an accident. While her doctor husband leaves Hong Kong for a meeting, an uninvited man arrives at their house. The man teases and tortures Heung, claiming that he is coming to avenge his wife...

programme.title: The Happenings
programme.desc: They are the generation who work hard at living it up at the discos, in midnight car races and occasional fight. They are not happy with the world they live in but are determined to make the most of it. They go racing down the freeway in a stolen car. When stopping at the petroleum station, they find they don't have money. On the spur of the moment, they decide to rob the station. After a fight, King Kong is badly hurt and Cream kills a staff by accident. Bee runs away from the group, badly shaken and frightened by this traumatic experience...

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: Jason escapes the city on an epic adventure into the Hajar Mountains.

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: Jason is in the Dubai Marina as he explores food that looks so good it goes viral.

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: Jason goes artsy in Al Quoz cooking up incredible dishes and meets chef Keren Ye.

programme.title: E1 - Spices
programme.desc: Jason's debut in Dubai is all things spice as he explores a traditional souk in the old town, shows us how to spice up our lives, and is joined by local chef Rahul Rana.

programme.title: Top Chef S17E10 -Colossal Coliseum Kaiseki
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: Superman returns after five years in space to find Lois engaged and Lex Luthor with a sinister plan that will endanger America.

programme.desc: Ruby struggles both to save the well and grant the wish of an enemy of the community.
